summary: A USCIS Alien Registration Requirement PSA (near-duplicate of the sibling clip): stock B-roll (DHS flag, fingerprint, INA document, child raising hand) under large captions, with a voiceover reading who must register under the Immigration and Nationality Act and Trump's directive. It is a captioned informational/compliance directive driven by narration, not a music-driven youth-appeal or genre piece.
notable_text: Immigration and Nationality; is making sure all aliens comply; when you applied for a U.S. visa; you need to make sure they register too; ARR Alien Registration Requirement; FOR MORE INFO: USCIS.GOV/ALIENREGISTRATION
